display.purpose: Hero headlines and page titles only.

body.purpose: General reading text, specs, and details.

motion.name: standard-transition
motion.purpose: Default styling transitions for hover and active state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">เริ่มเปรียบเทียบ</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background-color: #05f383; color: #070a13; border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px 16px; font-weight: 700; border: none; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.3s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background-color: transparent; color: #05f383; border: 1px solid #05f383; border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px 16px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.3s, color 0.3s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background-color: rgba(5, 243, 131, 0.1); }

components.name: Metric Card
components.description: Card container to display structured specs or items.
components.html:
รถยนต์ไฟฟ้าแนะนำ

รุ่นเด่นยอดนิยมที่ได้รับการค้นหาและเปรียบเทียบสูงสุด
components.css: .ds-card-container { background-color: #0f172a; border: 1px solid #1e293b; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-title { color: #ffffff; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-body { color: #94a3b8; font-size: 14px; margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Text input field for search and calculators.
components.html: <input class="ds-input-field" type="text" placeholder="ค้นหารุ่นรถ EV..." />
components.css: .ds-input-field { background-color: #0f172a; border: 1px solid #1e293b; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 12px; color: #ffffff; font-size: 14px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.3s; } .ds-input-field:focus { border-color: #05f383; }

narrative.overview: The design system for EV Compare Thailand is structured around extreme layout clarity, data accessibility, and high-efficiency typography. It serves as a precise tool for comparing electric vehicles, where readability of dense technical parameters is the absolute priority. The visual design rejects generic SaaS glassmorphism and excessive decorations in favor of solid borders, structured grids, and clean dark-mode surfaces.
keyCharacteristics: Dark Space Backdrop: Obsidian-level dark background that reduces eye strain during prolonged comparisons.
Accented Utility: Neon Charge Green and Volt Blue used sparingly and intentionally (under 10% of surface area) to draw focus to interactive elements and highlights.
Strict Border Definition: Content modules are defined by fine solid borders instead of soft dropshadows.

rules.name: The Accent Limitation Rule
rules.body: Primary Charge Green and secondary Volt Blue must carry no more than 10% of any given screen area. Their impact is in their rarity; they must guide the eye, not overwhelm it.

rules.name: The Content Wrap Rule
rules.body: Always use text-wrap: balance on H1-H3 headers to prevent awkward text orphans.

rules.name: The Zero Shadow Rule
rules.body: Ambient drop shadows are prohibited on cards and panels. Visual depth is established purely through background tone changes (e.g., transitioning from Deep Space to Ev Card background) and fine borders.

dos: Do use strict 1px solid borders (#1e293b) to structure grids and table items.
Do ensure all text colors hit a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against their backgrounds.
Do balance technical spec values with clear label headers.
donts: Don't use card corner radius larger than 12px.
Don't use soft shadows combined with fine borders.
Don't use gradient text backgrounds or neon glassmorphism.
Don't use diagonal stripe backgrounds or crude sketchy SVG icons.
